'''thovagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaciolacustrine|glaciolacustrine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaciolacustrine|glaciolacustrine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thovagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovagithi|thovagithi]] || [[word:thovagiji|thovagiji]] || [[word:thovagishi|thovagishi]] || [[word:thovagiki|thovagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovaguthuthu|thovaguthuthu]] || [[word:thovagujuju|thovagujuju]] || [[word:thovagushushu|thovagushushu]] || [[word:thovagukuku|thovagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaguthu|thovaguthu]] || [[word:thovaguju|thovaguju]] || [[word:thovagushu|thovagushu]] || [[word:thovaguku|thovaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagufthuf|thovagufthuf]] || [[word:thovagufjuf|thovagufjuf]] || [[word:thovagufshuf|thovagufshuf]] || [[word:thovagufkuf|thovagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovagethe|thovagethe]] || [[word:thovageje|thovageje]] || [[word:thovageshe|thovageshe]] || [[word:thovageke|thovageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovagothotho|thovagothotho]] || [[word:thovagojojo|thovagojojo]] || [[word:thovagoshosho|thovagoshosho]] || [[word:thovagokoko|thovagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagotho|thovagotho]] || [[word:thovagojo|thovagojo]] || [[word:thovagosho|thovagosho]] || [[word:thovagoko|thovagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagofthof|thovagofthof]] || [[word:thovagofjof|thovagofjof]] || [[word:thovagofshof|thovagofshof]] || [[word:thovagofkof|thovagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovagïfthïf|thovagïfthïf]] || [[word:thovagïfjïf|thovagïfjïf]] || [[word:thovagïfshïf|thovagïfshïf]] || [[word:thovagïfkïf|thovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovagïfthïfthïf|thovagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thovagïfjïfjïf|thovagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thovagïfshïfshïf|thovagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thovagïfkïfkïf|thovagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagïfthïf|thovagïfthïf]] || [[word:thovagïfjïf|thovagïfjïf]] || [[word:thovagïfshïf|thovagïfshïf]] || [[word:thovagïfkïf|thovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagïfthïf|thovagïfthïf]] || [[word:thovagïfjïf|thovagïfjïf]] || [[word:thovagïfshïf|thovagïfshïf]] || [[word:thovagïfkïf|thovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovagæthæ|thovagæthæ]] || [[word:thovagæjæ|thovagæjæ]] || [[word:thovagæshæ|thovagæshæ]] || [[word:thovagækæ|thovagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovagathatha|thovagathatha]] || [[word:thovagajaja|thovagajaja]] || [[word:thovagashasha|thovagashasha]] || [[word:thovagakaka|thovagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagatha|thovagatha]] || [[word:thovagaja|thovagaja]] || [[word:thovagasha|thovagasha]] || [[word:thovagaka|thovagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagafthaf|thovagafthaf]] || [[word:thovagafjaf|thovagafjaf]] || [[word:thovagafshaf|thovagafshaf]] || [[word:thovagafkaf|thovagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thovagasha|thovagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovagshësha|thovagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovagrosha|thovagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovagmusha|thovagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovagyasha|thovagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovagnkshësha|gothovagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovagnkrosha|gothovagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovagnkmusha|gothovagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovagnkyasha|gothovagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thovavagasha|thovavagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovavagshësha|thovavagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovavagrosha|thovavagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovavagmusha|thovavagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovavagyasha|thovavagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovavagnkshësha|gothovavagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovavagnkrosha|gothovavagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovavagnkmusha|gothovavagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovavagnkyasha|gothovavagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thevægasha|thevægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thevægshësha|thevægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thevægrosha|thevægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thevægmusha|thevægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thevægyasha|thevægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothevægnkshësha|gothevægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothevægnkrosha|gothevægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothevægnkmusha|gothevægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothevægnkyasha|gothevægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thovfagasha|thovfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovfagshësha|thovfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovfagrosha|thovfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovfagmusha|thovfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovfagyasha|thovfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovfagnkshësha|gothovfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovfagnkrosha|gothovfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovfagnkmusha|gothovfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovfagnkyasha|gothovfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
